svg.text: Irrigation fault simulator — full flow graph, 3 scenarios vs baseline

Every node of the flow graph painted from a live simulate() result. Edge/node colour: blue = wetted, grey = dry. Diamond = valve (green open / grey shut / red outline = open while not commanded). Big circle = head (grade colour). ⚡ = leak. Squares = tee/cap; small dots = hoses, junctions, swing joints.

g.text: all running zones full | pump ON | total 3.068 m3/h
S1 Electrical - cond.common broken (shared coil return)
zones 1,2,3,4 dead | pump ON | total 0.0 m3/h
S2 Valve pilot loop - Z1 metering_port clogged (only Z2 commanded)
zones 1 running while off | pump ON | total 3.068 m3/h
S3 Hydraulic leak - Z1.hose1 burst (Z1 commanded)
zones 1 weak; 1 leak(s), biggest at Z1.hose1 | pump ON | total 4.9612 m3/h
